name: @elizaos/plugin-personal-assistant
description: Personal-assistant orchestration plugin: BRIEF, PRIORITIZE, PERSONAL_ASSISTANT cross-domain orchestration, scheduled-task owner CRUD, and default-pack composition. Slimmed from the legacy plugin-lifeops; domain-specific surfaces have moved to plugin-inbox, plugin-goals, plugin-calendar, plugin-blocker, plugin-finances, plugin-relationships, etc.

scripts.verify: bun run lint:default-packs && bun run build:types && bun run test
scripts.test:background-real: vitest run --config vitest.background-real.config.ts test/scheduled-task-end-to-end.e2e.test.ts test/reminder-review-job.real.e2e.test.ts test/lifeops-scheduling.real.test.ts test/schedule-merged-state.real.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run --config vitest.src-integration.config.ts && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && vitest run --config packages/test/vitest/integration.config.ts plugins/plugin-personal-assistant/test/integration-lane.smoke.integration.test.ts plugins/plugin-personal-assistant/test/life-smoke.integration.test.ts plugins/plugin-personal-assistant/test/owner-agent-permission-matrix.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:scenarios: cd ../.. && SCENARIO_USE_LLM_PROXY=1 SCENARIO_LLM_PROXY_STRICT=1 bun packages/scenario-runner/src/cli.ts run packages/test/scenarios/reminders --lane pr-deterministic && cd plugins/plugin-personal-assistant && bun run test:scenarios:lifeops-spine
scripts.test:scenarios:lifeops-spine: cd ../.. && SCENARIO_USE_LLM_PROXY=1 SCENARIO_LLM_PROXY_STRICT=1 bun packages/scenario-runner/src/cli.ts run packages/scenario-runner/test/scenarios --lane pr-deterministic --scenario deterministic-lifeops-scheduled-tasks,deterministic-lifeops-dispatch-retry,deterministic-lifeops-recurrence,deterministic-lifeops-concurrent-day,deterministic-lifeops-multiday-journey
scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types
